title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Synergy Property Development

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Synergy Property Development
jsonLd.description:
Synergy Property Development, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Synergy Property Development:
Synergy Property Development is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Synergy Property Development!
